meta.title: AVtouch — audio, video & control systems integration | Warsaw, Poland
meta.description: AVtouch designs and installs audio, video and control systems for conference rooms, hotels, offices and homes. Design, installation and 24/7 service. Warsaw, all of Poland.
meta.ogAlt: AVtouch — audio, video and control integration

hero.sub: AVtouch integrates audio, video and control in buildings meant to impress — from office towers to private cinemas.

about.p1: We create modern audiovisual solutions that support communication and business growth. We design and deliver professional AV systems – from conference rooms and video conferencing, through digital signage, to advanced sound and video display systems.
about.p2: We combine experience with the latest technology, delivering solutions tailored to our clients' needs. We are committed to quality, reliability and end-to-end service – from design and installation to technical support and maintenance.

items.d: Video conferencing, wireless presentation and room booking — one standard across the company.
Crestron, Extron, KNX. The whole building on a single touch panel.
Electroacoustics, LED screens and video walls — from design to tuning and content.
Private cinemas and multiroom, plus 24/7 service with SLA agreements.

process.sub: // FROM THE FIRST CALL TO ONGOING SUPPORT

steps.d: We get to know your building, needs and budget. We come over, measure and listen.
Concept, equipment selection and documentation. You know exactly what you get and for how much.
Cabling, mounting and control programming. Clean, on time, no excuses.
We hand over a system that simply works — and your team knows how to use it.
We stay with you after the launch. We often react before you notice a problem.

work.ctaD: Tell us about it — you get a first concept and budget within 48 hours.

projects.d: 12 rooms, Crestron control, streaming and simultaneous interpretation
projects.alt: AVtouch project — conference centre with AV system

testimonials.heading: Client voices
testimonials.quote: “AVtouch designed and deployed AV in 40 rooms of our headquarters. Zero downtime in two years — the best recommendation I know.”

cards.q: “The ballroom sounds just as good at a conference as at a concert. Guests can hear it.”
“One button and the cinema starts. Exactly what we wanted — no remotes, no fiddling.”

contact.sub: Tell us what you are planning — we reply within 48 hours with a concept and budget.
contact.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
